candidates.why: Direct revenue label and preferred top-line candidate.
Also a standard top-line revenue label; useful as fallback if reporting label changes.
Not operating revenue/top-line; financial income should not be used for REVT unless no true revenue exists.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list per instructions. Excluded 'Other financial revenue' because it is not top-line sales/revenue.

No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present on the Income Statement. Labels such as 'Goods For Resale' and 'Raw Material' appear but are not clearly reported COGS lines in this statement preview.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead component and preferred SG&A-type expense.
Standard overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component and not a total.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead component rows from the candidate list and excluded depreciation/amortization and totals such as 'Total management costs'.
No research and development expense line is visible in the provided statements.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and similar profit/loss items
candidates.why: Best match for reported interest expense; appears as the main financial expense label.
Direct interest expense label; useful fallback if used in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but narrower than total interest expense; only fallback after broader labels.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses and similar profit/loss items
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list ordered from broadest and most representative interest expense label to narrower fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.
Usable only if no parent/owners equity line exists; here it would include NCI and risk double counting.
Balancing row, not an accounting line item to use for BE.
Not equity; entire balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Selected parent equity line to exclude non-controlling interests as required.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.
Best balance sheet minority interest / NCI label.
Direct synonym for minority interest; useful as fallback if label changes.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels only; excluded income statement attribution rows because MIB should come from the balance sheet.
